{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324094733152468662CDF2A874D44"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608574971716485912","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的还行，从书中写到的各种细节不难看出初代弗拉基米尔是在努力地向着大同的目标奋进，但世事流转，理想的光芒逐渐暗淡，令人惋惜。而主角前期只想摆烂的想法着实看的人捉急，不知主角思想何时能转变，扛起初代的红色理想大旗"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771511548,"group_id":"7595193639312051262","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Oth0aAWF6I6vclZtVEJ0VdGbvUldUFVLUjg6g3gSNI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2272020889087300","user_name":"狂拽角质层"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2272020889087300","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595193639312051262","book_info":{"abstract":"标签：红色文、反套路、迪化、单女主、治愈。
我，罗德，穿越成魔族老天王，但只想躺平。

魔族大王，将俘虏的圣女丢给我，命我将其催眠，为活命，为了不暴露身份，我对着俘虏的人族圣女，不得不表演了一场假催眠。

她醒来后却单膝跪地，眼中燃着我没见过的光：“感谢您，主人。您撕碎了我的虚伪，给了我新生。”

后来我才知道，她根本没被催眠。

她只是受够了光明教廷的谎言，受够了无尽的荒诞与背叛，在绝望中，她相信了我的催眠。

在我笨拙的表演中，脑补出了一整套救世蓝图。

我战术撤退，她说这是“千里绝杀之局”。

我雪中送炭，她说这是“大同理想的伟大试点”。

我忍无可忍，在魔王殿拍案而起：“我受够这破班了！这魔族吃枣药丸！”

满朝文武却热泪盈眶，山呼海啸：“老天王深谋远虑！这是要带领我等，再造乾坤！”

望着狂热追随我的圣女，和那些被理想辜负的民众。

我叹了口气，捡起了那柄我本不愿碰的的镰刀。

——好吧，如果这个世界需要一场“误会”才能得救。

那我不装了，我来当这个“神”。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e8643f130cdcab163d890f7e16f6d29d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东方白龙王","author_id":"","book_id":"7595193639312051262","book_name":"圣女大人，请停止你的迪化行为！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0a898","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595198893806060094","read_count":"770","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"167919"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"76","tags":"西方奇幻,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,异世大陆,轻小说,穿越,迪化,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e8643f130cdcab163d890f7e16f6d29d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500853&x-signature=zAhP%2FJtyNzn5rmyFWwvGLtGMpU0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"959186747801028","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelap 我，罗德，穿越成魔族老天王，但只想躺平。

魔族大王，将俘虏的圣女丢给我，命我将其催眠，为活命，为了不暴露身份，我对着俘虏的人族圣女，不得不表演了一场假催眠。

她醒来后却单膝跪地，眼中燃着我没见过的光：“感谢您，主人。您撕碎了我的虚伪，给了我新生。”

后来我才知道，她根本没被催眠。

她只是受够了光明教廷的谎言，受够了无尽的荒诞与背叛，在绝望中，她相信了我的催眠。

在我笨拙的表演中，脑补出了一整套救世蓝图。

我战术撤退，她说这是“千里绝杀之局”。

我雪中送炭，她说这是“大同理想的伟大试点”。

我忍无可忍，在魔王殿拍案而起：“我受够这破班了！这魔族吃枣药丸！”

满朝文武却热泪盈眶，山呼海啸：“老天王深谋远虑！这是要带领我等，再造乾坤！”

望着狂热追随我的圣女，和那些被理想辜负的民众。

我叹了口气，捡起了那柄我本不愿碰的的镰刀。

——好吧，如果这个世界需要一场“误会”才能得救。

p_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324094733152468662CDF2A874D44"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读39分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2342,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":97},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1772021434,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609714736475128601","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者用心了，除了息壤和有毒这平台，其他地方为了避开题材那些人那些事要说思想内核都很难，一不留神就虚无主义了，再者就是写历史王朝那些事，即使平行时空都不好过审。所以，西幻异界不错，特别是哥布林立场不错，魔族立场和魔甲军更也不错。总之，相信有心的读者知道你在写什么，五分送上，魔族复兴奋斗史，他值得。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771777697,"group_id":"7595193639312051262","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxlaGxJM+mSSoVOFCSbcDMY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877005&x-signature=F7rwZ9C6HX8CXHTnqUkNbe1L%2B0Q%3D","user_id":"463586198317","user_name":"燕赵剑男春"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"463586198317","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1736903729,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595193639312051262","book_info":{"abstract":"标签：红色文、反套路、迪化、单女主、治愈。
